steps.title: Find the slope using the given point and y-intercept
steps.content:
The line has y-intercept $(0, -16)$, so its equation is $y = mx - 16$. Using the point $(-12, 44)$ from the table:

$$44 = m(-12) - 16$$

$$60 = -12m$$

$$m = -5$$

steps.title: Find a and b using the equation y = -5x - 16
Calculate a + b
steps.content: $$a + b = (-6) + (-26) = -32$$ That matches choice A — A is correct.
